mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.order_id, r.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, r.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.merchant_reply, r.reply_time, r.create_time, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(od.name, ' x', od.number) SEPARATOR '、') as order_detail FROM order_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON r.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN order_detail od ON r.order_id = od.order_id
r.merchant_id = #{query.merchantId}
AND r.rating BETWEEN 4 AND 5
AND r.rating = 3
AND r.rating BETWEEN 1 AND 2
AND r.images IS NOT NULL AND r.images != ''
GROUP BY r.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_review r
r.merchant_id = #{query.merchantId}
AND r.rating BETWEEN 4 AND 5
AND r.rating = 3
AND r.rating BETWEEN 1 AND 2
AND r.images IS NOT NULL AND r.images != ''

SELECT r.id, r.order_id, r.user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, r.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.merchant_reply, r.reply_time, r.create_time, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(od.name, ' x', od.number) SEPARATOR '、') as order_detail FROM order_review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON r.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN order_detail od ON r.order_id = od.order_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY r.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
